steps.assistant_text: Cross-module masked-twin sweep (scripts/find-masked-twins.py) grouped gl_func_0006C9F4 with the matched kernel func_80004650 in a strict 56-insn signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison (scripts/twin-compare.py) showed 0 non-reloc diffs. Both are libultra __osPiRawStartDma: wait on PI status & 3, set up the direct-mapped 0xA4600000 register block, dispatch by direction (0=read/1=write/else=-1). Ported the kernel donor C verbatim to game_libs_ido53_6C9F4.c at IDO 5.3 -O1 (the libultra-carve recipe; default unit is -O2). The collapsed cart-base helper + DMA cfg-base global map to the address-0 USO placeholders gl_func_00000000 / D_00000000 (jal 0 / lui 0,lw 0 in the ROM). Spliced into game_libs_post1b2c.c.o via REPLACE_FUNC_BODY (0xc8->0xe0, 3 donor relocs imported).

metadata.verification: standalone donor .text reloc-masked byte-identical to target (56 insns, 0 non-reloc diffs); spliced build/.o function reloc-masked byte-identical to expected/.o; build relocs (gl_func_00000000, D_00000000) both resolve to 0x0; full `make` ROM byte-identical to baserom; make verify-blocks OK.
